Title: Research on Dialogue Generation of Emotion Enhanced Large Language Model Based on Deep Learning
Venue: Journal of Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence
Abstract: As the scenarios of human-computer interaction in China's social development have gradually expanded and giant artificial intelligences (GIIs) have become more frequent, making users feel better through emotional identification and empathic responses has become increasingly significant.
